name: Railway
description_short: Railway Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving North Dakota members with loans, savings accounts, and financial services through multiple branches.
description_long:
Railway Credit Union is a federally-insured credit union operating in North Dakota with a primary focus on serving the local community and railroad-affiliated individuals. The organization has expanded membership eligibility to include U.S. military personnel, veterans, and their families, broadening its traditional membership base. They operate physical branches including their newly opened Bismarck location at 3005 Rock Island Place and have received recognition as "Best Credit Union" and "Community Favorite Mortgage Lender" in The Bismarck Tribune Best of the Best awards.

Railway Credit Union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans (as low as 4.68% APR), home equity lines of credit (6.22% APR), VISA credit cards (9.95% APR), share certificates with APY up to 3.50%, and mortgage services. Members have access to online banking, a mobile app for account management, and online loan applications. The credit union provides both consumer lending and deposit products, positioning itself as a full-service financial institution for its membership base.

The credit union distinguishes itself through community involvement and member recognition programs, including their RCU Hall of Fame, Wall of Honor for veterans and first responders, and volunteer activities documented on their website. They emphasize personalized relationships with members rather than treating customers as account numbers, and have invested in physical expansion with their new Bismarck facility. The organization has achieved national recognition as a "Best Credit Union to Work For," suggesting strong internal culture and management practices.

As a credit union, Railway operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned model, meaning profits are returned to members through better rates and lower fees. However, membership eligibility requirements and geographic service areas may limit accessibility for some consumers. The specific lending terms and approval requirements vary based on creditworthiness and individual circumstances.
services: Auto loans with rates as low as 4.68% APR
Home equity lines of credit at 6.22% APR
Share certificates with APY up to 3.50%
Checking accounts with automatic payment options
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.68% APR for qualifying 2022+ vehicles
Home equity lines of credit available at 6.22% APR with flexible terms
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure returns profits to members as better rates and lower fees
Membership expansion to include U.S. military, veterans, and their families
Physical locations including newly opened Bismarck branch for in-person service
Mobile app and online banking access for 24/7 account management
Active community involvement with documented volunteer programs and community recognition initiatives
Nationally recognized as a 'Best Credit Union to Work For' indicating strong operations
cons: Membership eligibility requirements may restrict who can join the credit union
Geographic service area appears limited to North Dakota, not serving nationwide
VISA credit card APR of 9.95% is higher than many competitors' introductory or standard rates
Website content does not clearly specify membership eligibility criteria or service area boundaries
best_for: North Dakota residents seeking auto financing with competitive rates and a community-focused institution
Homeowners interested in home equity lines of credit from a local credit union
U.S. military personnel, veterans, and their families newly eligible for RCU membership
Community-minded consumers who value credit union membership and local reinvestment
diagnosis: Railway Credit Union is best for North Dakota residents and newly eligible military/veteran members seeking competitive rates on auto loans and home equity products from a community-focused, member-owned institution. Primary caveat: membership eligibility is restricted to specific categories and geographic service areas, and the credit union does not serve nationwide customers.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
